description_long: This is a robust, metallic helmet with a prominent gold-colored dome and two large, black, curved horns extending from either side. The helmet features a pronounced T-shaped face guard at the front, bordered by a darker metallic trim with engraved patterns. The surface of the helmet is slightly weathered, showing scratches and marks that suggest frequent use or age. The horns are smooth and glossy, contrasting with the matte, textured finish of the helmet's main body. There are no visible ventilation holes, logos, or graphic designs on the surface. The interior is likely hollow to accommodate a human head, and the overall design evokes a Viking or fantasy warrior aesthetic.
description: A gold metallic helmet with large black curved horns and a T-shaped face guard, featuring a weathered, textured finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the T-shaped face guard, gold dome, and both black horns extending outward.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curvature of the right horn and the engraved metallic trim along the helmet's edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, gold dome and the symmetrical placement of the black horns.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite side, showing the left horn and the helmet's textured surface.
